description: Generate PowerPoint presentations from CMPPort website data with interactive customization

stories.title: Extract project data from index.html
stories.description: Parse index.html to extract all 12 projects, team members, images, and metadata
acceptanceCriteria: Parser reads index.html and extracts all 12 project gallery names (atlas, quarter, obk, trp, kbh, pryd, obkf, thaiOil, tempFactory, pierreRepair, kaoyai, boonNak)
All project images and image paths are extracted and validated to exist in img/ directory
Team member names and biographies are extracted from 'Our Team' section
Extract hero images, gallery image counts per project
data/projects.json created with structure: {projects: [...], team: [...], company: {...}}
Verify projects.json contains all 12 projects with image arrays

stories.title: Implement interactive CLI for presentation selection
stories.description: Build CLI that prompts user for presentation type, projects, team members, and customization
acceptanceCriteria: CLI prompts user to select presentation type: (1) Portfolio/Showcase (2) Team Profile (3) Annual Report
CLI allows selection of specific projects to include (multi-select or checkbox-style)
CLI allows selection of specific team members to include
CLI prompts for presentation title and subtitle
CLI validates selections (non-empty, valid project IDs, valid team member names)
CLI returns structured selection object with all user choices

stories.title: Implement Portfolio/Showcase presentation generator
stories.description: Generate Portfolio PPTX with all selected projects and images
acceptanceCriteria: Portfolio PPTX contains: Title slide + 1 slide per selected project + Closing slide
Project slides include: project name, hero/gallery image, description text
Title slide shows company name and presentation title
All selected project images display without errors in PPTX
Text is readable and not cut off (proper margin/sizing)

stories.title: Implement Team Profile presentation generator
stories.description: Generate Team Profile PPTX with company overview, team members, and featured projects
acceptanceCriteria: Team Profile PPTX contains: Title slide + Company overview + 1 slide per selected team member + Featured projects + Closing slide
Team member slides display: name, role, bio text
Company overview slide displays tagline and basic company info
Featured projects carousel shows 4-6 key projects with images
All text displays clearly with proper formatting

stories.title: Implement Annual/Status Report presentation generator
stories.description: Generate Annual Report PPTX with timeline and statistics
acceptanceCriteria: Annual Report PPTX contains: Title slide + Summary statistics slide + Timeline slides (grouped by year) + Team snapshot + Closing slide
Summary slide shows: total projects completed, team size, date range
Timeline groups projects by year (extracted from projects.json year field)
Team snapshot displays selected team members
All images and text render correctly

stories.title: Create main entry point and integrate all components
stories.description: Build main.py that orchestrates data extraction, CLI, and PPTX generation
acceptanceCriteria: main.py checks if data/projects.json exists; if not, runs extraction
main.py launches interactive CLI
main.py routes user selection to appropriate PPTX generator (Portfolio/Team/Annual)
main.py saves output PPTX with format: output/<presentation-name>_<timestamp>.pptx
main.py returns file path to generated PPTX
Can regenerate different presentations without re-parsing data/projects.json

stories.title: Verify all presentation types and test edge cases
stories.description: Test full workflow end-to-end for all three presentation types
acceptanceCriteria: Generate Portfolio with all 12 projects → PPTX opens in PowerPoint without errors
Generate Team Profile with subset of team (e.g., 5 members) → verify all selected members appear
Generate Annual Report → projects grouped correctly by year
Generate Portfolio with single project → works correctly
Generate PPTX, regenerate with different params → data.json reused (no re-parse)
All images display correctly in generated PPTX files
Generated files save to output/ directory with proper timestamps
